compiled_state.title: Add multi-stack audit tool entries to DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Add a Security Audit Commands section to DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md with entries for all three audit tools required by the done definition. Each entry includes the tool name, named invocation form, and a brief description.

### New section content:
Add after the existing content (before the closing of the file) a section:

## Security Audit Commands

| Language | Tool | Invocation |
|----------|------|-----------|
| Python | pip-audit | `pip-audit --strict` |
| JavaScript/TypeScript | npm audit | `npm audit --audit-level=moderate` |
| Ruby | bundle-audit | `bundle-audit check --update` |

Each tool should be briefly described:
- pip-audit: Scans Python dependencies for known security vulnerabilities
- npm audit: Scans Node.js dependencies; --audit-level=moderate reports moderate+ severity
- bundle-audit: Scans Ruby gem dependencies; --update refreshes the advisory database first

### TDD: RED test pre-written in Task fa27-74aa
Implementation must turn the RED test GREEN — this is the GREEN phase, not an exemption.

### After implementation:
Remove RED marker from .test-index: remove [test_dependency_guidance_audit_tools] marker.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/docs/DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md (EDIT)
- .test-index (EDIT — remove RED marker after GREEN)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md contains pip-audit entry with pip-audit --strict
  Verify: grep -q 'pip-audit --strict' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md
- [ ] DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md contains npm audit entry with npm audit --audit-level=moderate
  Verify: grep -q 'npm audit --audit-level=moderate' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md
- [ ] DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md contains bundle-audit entry with bundle-audit check --update
  Verify: grep -q 'bundle-audit check --update' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md
- [ ] Security Audit Commands section heading exists
  Verify: grep -q 'Security Audit Commands\|Audit Commands\|Audit Tools' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: ! grep -q '\[test_dependency_guidance_audit_tools\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] test_dependency_guidance_audit_tools passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test-doc-polyglot-compliance.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — Files: DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md (Security Audit Commands section added).
comments.author: Test
